{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Harrow
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Harrow]] was dragged into the [[void]] by [[Limit]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Abidan]] evacuated the elite of [[Harrow]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
